title: Do you really need a vps for EA trading?
author: Annual-Register-3683
selftext:
IDK if this is the right sub to ask this but, I’ve been getting more into EA trading and trying to figure out the best setup. Right now I’m just using my own PC, but I keep seeing people say a VPS is almost a must if you’re running bots.

I get the idea, it keeps your platform running 24/7 and you don’t have to worry about internet cuts or your PC turning off, but I’m not sure if it’s really necessary or just a nice upgrade. For those actually running EAs, do you use a VPS?

comments.author: ScratchSpiritual5977
comments.body:
Sí, uso VPS y te explico por qué vale la pena: el problema no es solo que tu PC se apague, es el reinicio automático de Windows a las 3am con una posición abierta, el internet que se cae 2 minutos en el peor momento o la plataforma congelándose sin que te enteres. Con una EA operando dinero real, cualquiera de esas cosas duele.

Además, un VPS te da algo clave: estabilidad 24/7 y mejor latencia con el broker.

No necesitas nada caro, con 1–2GB de RAM es suficiente para MT4/MT5. Antes de pagar, pregúntale a tu broker, muchos de ellos ofrecen VPS gratis si cumples cierto volumen.

Si estás en fase de prueba, la PC está bien por ahora, pero si ya operas con dinero real de forma continua, yo no me la jugaría.

comments.author: HowAmIHere2000
comments.body: No but then when you turn off your computer, your bot stops.

comments.author: stereotomyalan
comments.body:
100%. After you start using a VPS, you understand what you are missing.

And they are pretty cheap nowadays, I use contabo.

replies.author: VoodooKing
replies.body: I've used Contabo and when my VPS went down for a few days along with my MT5 terminals, I got out of there real quick. I was really lucky there were no open positions.

replies.author: stereotomyalan
replies.body: Oh ok... let me backup then!

replies.author: Actual_Resort1892
replies.body:
Try FXVM, been using them for quite a while now 
It a windows VPS so you can interact with the MT5 terminal easily and also faster to set up.

Been using them since 2024, service is reliable.

comments.author: nitinko9968
comments.body: VPS is def a must, but don't go too cheap like contabo cause it will crash, that's what happened to me. EVer since I've been running my EAs on ninjamobiletrader and very happy it's actually running 24/7 smoothly
